ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type (e.g., Credit card, Check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description_short" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "product_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the marketing campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_campaigns" (
  "customer_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-campaign association */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
